## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what does this PR change? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (adds functionality)
- [ ] Data update (adds/modifies JSON data files)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo test` passes (all 1134+ tests)
- [ ] `hemtt check` passes
- [ ] Python data validation passes (`python tests/validate_data.py`)
- [ ] New data files validated against schemas

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
